'''''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' 11''' is the eleventh issue of ''[[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine]]''. It was published by [[Topps]] in [[April]] [[1997]]. The issue's theme focused on [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]].

The Deluxe Collectors' Edition of issue 11, exclusive to subscribers and comic stores, came polybagged with two promotional trading cards—a [[1997 Topps Star Wars Special Edition Widevision|''1997 Topps Star Wars Special Edition'']] hologram card and another highlighting issue 11's cover art by [[Walter Simonson]] and [[Richard Ory]]—and a ''[[1997 Topps Star Wars Vehicles]]'' promotional postcard. This issue also included a [[Darth Vader Poster|Darth Vader]] gatefold poster.

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}
